fields.METRIC_1_DESC: Improves application response times for large scale search workloads.
fields.METRIC_2_DESC: Reduces infrastructure and engineering cost compared with custom search stacks.
fields.METRIC_3_DESC: Unifies search, analytics, and vector retrieval in one platform.

fields.METRIC_1_DESC: Reduces mean time to resolution by correlating telemetry signals.
fields.METRIC_2_DESC: Consolidates logs, metrics, and traces into one observability platform.
fields.METRIC_3_DESC: Handles massive telemetry scale without sacrificing search speed.

fields.METRIC_1_DESC: Accelerates threat investigation through correlated security telemetry.
fields.METRIC_2_DESC: Reduces alert fatigue through better correlation and detection logic.
fields.METRIC_3_DESC: Lowers total cost compared with legacy SIEM platforms.

fields.METRIC_1_DESC: Reduces token usage through better retrieval and context engineering.
fields.METRIC_2_DESC: Improves AI response speed by retrieving relevant context faster.
fields.METRIC_3_DESC: Runs search, AI retrieval, and inference inside one platform.

fields.METRIC_1_DESC: Search, observability, and security delivered from one platform.
fields.METRIC_2_DESC: Reduces operational complexity by consolidating multiple data systems.
fields.METRIC_3_DESC: Built on open APIs and open source foundations.
